permits.description: Install new half bathroom, install bathroom floors and vinyl tiles. Enclose washer and dryer. Install a new egress window. Build new wall for bedroom, install new door. Build cubbies with open shelving. Enclose all walls, finish carpentry and paint. Install new electricity up to code.
permits.score_reasons: moderate cost ($63,875); permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The owner is performing a significant interior reconfiguration by adding a bedroom and a half-bath to a very small living area, which increases resale value, though it lacks the kitchen renovation and non-owner occupancy status associated with high-likelihood flips.
